name: SSD 2.0
description: Welcome to the continuation of Summer Slim Down! The next 8 weeks will focus on PFM progressions along with HIIT style cardo circuits to burn calories. The nutritional piece is going to be 85-90% of the puzzle so if you here is the reminder you needed if last round nutrition was lacking. If you are choosing to follow your Macros, remember that fruits and veggies should make up the majority of your carb macros.
